title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Kolte-Patil Developers

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Kolte-Patil Developers
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
